title: Atomics Client
description: Atomics Client is a customizable Fabric PvP client that adds clean visuals, totem pop customization, combat overlays, stats tracking, and useful quality-of-life tools.
body:
# 🟢 Atomics Client

> A customizable Minecraft PvP client focused on clean visuals, useful overlays, combat info, and quality-of-life tools.

---

## ✨ Overview

Atomics Client gives you simple control over the visuals and tools that matter during PvP.

Customize totem pops, overlays, nametags, shield/fire visuals, PvP stats, Friend/Foe tracking, zoom, fullbright, freelook, macros, armor HUD, food preview overlays, and more through a clean in-game settings menu.

Most settings update live without needing to restart your game.

---

## 🎨 Main Features

### 🔹 Visual Customization
- Totem hue shifting and pop customization
- Totem retextures using other Minecraft items
- Adjustable pop overlays, particles, and sounds
- Shield and fire overlay controls
- Empty bucket overlay
- Projectile trails
- Food preview overlay
- Partial status icons

---

### ⚔️ PvP Tools
- PvP stats display
- Win-odds style estimates
- Session and all-time stat tracking
- Reach display
- TNT timer
- Auto GG
- Customizable Armor HUD
- Low armor durability warnings

---

### 🛡️ Armor HUD
- Shows armor durability on screen
- Custom HUD positioning
- Horizontal or vertical layout
- Adjustable armor spacing
- Optional hotbar-style border
- Durability display modes:
  - Numbers
  - Percent
  - Bars

---

### 🍗 Food Preview Overlay
- Shows food and saturation preview while holding food
- Customizable overlay appearance
- Helps preview hunger changes before eating

---

### 🏷️ Nametag Customization
- Custom nametag modules
- Toggleable ping, pop counter, win odds, and opponent stats
- Reorderable nametag items
- Tier-style PvP tags and icons

---

### 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Friend/Foe System
- Mark players as friends, foes, or neutral
- Colored Friend/Foe overlays
- Configurable overlay style, color, and opacity
- Optional friend attack protection

---

### 🛠️ Quality-of-Life
- Zoom
- Freelook
- Full Bright
- Time Changer
- Streamer Mode
- Chat Macros
- Dual Spectate Camera

---

### 🎛️ Clean Settings UI
- Organized tabs and sections
- Searchable settings
- Keybinds menu
- Armor HUD position editor
- Mod Menu support
- Live config updates

---

## ⚡ Performance

Atomics Client is built to stay lightweight while giving you extra PvP visuals, overlays, and useful client-side tools.

---

## 🧪 Compatibility

- Minecraft: `1.21.11`
- Loader: `Fabric`
- Requires: `Fabric API`
- Optional: `Mod Menu`

---

## 💬 Final Note

Atomics Client is made for players who want more control over how their game looks and feels during PvP, without needing a bunch of separate mods.
